name: crossfit-claude-skills
description: Standalone, open-source Claude Agent Skills repository for CrossFit coaching — source of truth for the Skill Me Functional Fitness Coaching Pack.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:frontmatter && npm run validate:skills && npm run validate:links && npm run validate:triggers && npm run validate:sources
scripts.build: npm run build:inventory && npm run build:seed
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run build && npm run evals && npm test
